flashcards.back:
A technique to map data of arbitrary size to fixed-size values.

Used to quickly locate data using a key.

α = n / m

n = number of elements
m = table size

Keep α < 0.7 for good performance.

Average: O(1) for search, insert, delete

Worst: O(n) when many collisions

When two different keys produce the same hash index:

hash(key1) % m = hash(key2) % m

Must be handled by collision resolution.
